GlobalPolicy.module-level-focus: Fast deterministic checks close to the module
GlobalPolicy.wave-level-focus: API smoke tests via curl against running server
GlobalPolicy.phase-level-focus: Full browser testing + real data on VM
GlobalPolicy.redaction: Never log API tokens, user prompt content, or raw LLM responses in full.

VF-001.NAME: Employee Report Instant
VF-001.scenario: Admin opens employee report for Радько Кирилл, period 30d
VF-001.expected-outcome: JSON with totals, session list, anomaly flags, hourly heatmap — response < 500ms

VF-002.NAME: Session Summarize On-Demand
VF-002.scenario: Admin clicks Summarize on a session with 18 generations
VF-002.expected-outcome: Summary text, topic, is_work classification — cached in DB — second click instant from cache

VF-003.NAME: Summarize All Background
VF-003.scenario: Admin clicks Summarize All for employee with 5 sessions without summary
VF-003.expected-outcome: Background thread processes all 5, topbar shows progress, survives page refresh

VF-004.NAME: Anomaly Detection
VF-004.scenario: Employee has generation at 23:15 on a Saturday with image-gen model
VF-004.expected-outcome: Two anomalies flagged: OFF_HOURS + WEEKEND, one UNUSUAL_MODEL

required-signals.log-marker: [Anomaly][detect] found N anomalies for employee X

scenarios.scenario-1: CREATE TABLE session_summaries succeeds on startup
scenarios.scenario-2: Upsert creates new summary, second upsert updates it
scenarios.scenario-3: get_or_none returns None for unknown session, cached for known

module-checks.check-1: curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/employee-report?employee=Радько+Кирилл&period=30d" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['totals']['cost']>0"
module-checks.check-2: curl -s http://localhost:5000/api/employee-report/list | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert len(d['employees'])==12"

scenarios.scenario-1: Employee report returns correct cost sum for known employee
scenarios.scenario-2: Employee list returns all 12 keys with non-zero totals
scenarios.scenario-3: Unknown employee returns empty sessions, zero totals

module-checks.check-1: curl -s -X POST "http://localhost:5000/api/session/summarize?sessionId=168c4203-32ad-4a0d-97ed-ac7a7ac3a62b" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'summary' in d"

scenarios.scenario-1: First summarize calls LLM and caches result
scenarios.scenario-2: Second summarize returns from cache instantly
scenarios.scenario-3: Invalid session_id returns error, not crash
scenarios.scenario-4: LLM API error returns structured error with retry suggestion

module-checks.check-1: curl -s "http://localhost:5000/api/employee-report?employee=Радько+Кирилл&period=30d" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert isinstance(d.get('anomalies'),list)"

scenarios.scenario-3: 100 generations in 1 hour trigger BURST anomaly

module-checks.check-1: Open http://10.61.11.54:5000 in browser, click "📊 По сотрудникам" tab — employee list appears
module-checks.check-2: Click on employee name — report loads with sessions, anomalies, heatmap

scenarios.scenario-1: Employee list shows all 12 employees with costs
scenarios.scenario-2: Drill-down shows sessions with Summarize buttons

Gate-Phase-1.goal: Employee Report works without AI — instant aggregation from DB for all 12 employees

required-evidence.evidence-1: All 12 employees returned with non-zero cost
required-evidence.evidence-2: Session list present for employees with session_id
required-evidence.evidence-4: UI renders employee list and drill-down report

Gate-Phase-2.goal: LLM summarization works — sessions get summaries cached in DB

required-evidence.evidence-1: Summary contains topic and is_work classification
required-evidence.evidence-3: Summarize All processes multiple sessions in background
